title: Greeting Generator
description: A simple program that asks for your name and says hello!
source:
"""Greeting Generator
Order: 1
Demo: true

A simple program that asks for your name and says hello!
"""

name = input("What is your name? ")
color = input("What is your favorite color? ")

print("\n---")
print(f"Hello, {name}!")
print(f"{color} is a beautiful color!")
print("---")

title: Turtle Drawing (Broken)
description: This program tries to use the turtle graphics library, which doesn't work in the browser!
source:
"""Turtle Drawing (Broken)
Order: 3
Demo: true

This program tries to use the turtle graphics library, which doesn't work in the browser!
"""

import turtle

t = turtle.Turtle()
for _ in range(4):
    t.forward(100)
    t.right(90)
    
turtle.done()
compatibilityReason: Turtle graphics require a desktop environment.
